metadata.title: Investment Banking | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Realizing the increasingly diverse needs of its customers for advisory and structured finance transactions, a specialized department focusing on Investment Banking services has been established at Meezan Bank that is equipped to provide comprehensive and innovative financial solutions through a diverse product offering to its clients.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Investment Banking Corporate Advisory and Structured Finance If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Innovative & Complete Financial Solutions Realizing the increasingly diverse needs of its customers for advisory and structured finance transactions, a specialized department focusing on Investment Banking services has been established at Meezan Bank that is equipped to provide comprehensive and innovative financial solutions through a diverse product offering to its clients. In a short span of time, the Bank has established itself as a market leader in the Investment Banking market of Pakistan through providing Shariah-compliant Investment Banking services. The Bank has developed core expertise in arranging syndicated, structured and Project finance and providing advice on mergers and acquisitions, buy-side / sell-side advisory, financial restructuring, structured equity and venture capital investments. Meezan Bank’s Investment Banking team, with highly qualified and experienced professionals including ACAs, CFA charter-holders, ACCAs and MBAs, offers its specialized services across the spectrum of Investment Banking activities, which includes and Project finance transactions and providing financial advisory services for the following: Syndicate Finance Long and Short Term Finance We facilitate corporations to raise large ticket financing requirements by forming a consortium of financial institutions. We offer numerous financing solutions for our clients to fulfill their long-term as well as short-term financing requirements. Project Finance Solutions for Green Field/Brown Field Projects We provide complete financing solutions to green field / brown field projects, with limited or no recourse basis. Bank’s Investment Banking department has a proven track record of successfully executing numerous Project Finance transactions and to date has arranged various project finance deals of over Rs. 100 billion. Meezan Bank, also has the credit of structuring and arranging the first ever syndicated Islamic Project Finance Facility and first ever private to private power project in Pakistan. Sukuks Finance for Private & Listed Sukuks Depending upon customers’ requirements, we provide arrangement, shariah structuring / advisory, underwriting and placement services for privately placed and listed sukuks. Meezan Bank the credit of advising the first ever series of short-term Sukuk and arranging for first ever Sukuk backed Project financing in Pakistan. We are also acting as Joint Financial Advisor to GoP for the Sovereign Sukuk program. Structured Finance Creative Finance Solutions Structured finance involves highly complex financial transactions. It is useful in cases where standard financing products do not meet a company’s unique requirements. Investment Banking department offers creatively structured transactions including off balance sheet working capital and capital expenditure financing to fulfill our customers’ business needs. Financial Advisory Services Shariah-compliant Advisory Products Our specialist team offers a wide range of equity and advisory products including innovative shariah compliant solutions for : Mergers Acquisitions Buy-side / sell-side advisory Financial Restructuring Structured Equity Initial Public Offerings Private Placement of Equity Venture Capital Investments Underwriting Secure Issue of Securities Underwriting involves the Bank absorbing the risk of under-subscription in relation to new and secondary issues. Meezan Bank is a registered underwriter under Underwriting Rules 2015. The Bank offers underwriting services both as lead underwriter and as a consortium member. The Bank’s underwriting services include both private as well as public offerings of equity and debt transactions. Key Transactions 2019 2018 2017 2016 2015 2014 2013 2012 2011 2010 NASDA Green Energy Private Limited 50MW Wind Power Project PKR 4,703 Million Mandated Lead Advisor & Arranger, Intercreditor Agent, Project Monitoring Bank, Shariah Structuring Bank, Onshore Trustee & Accounts Bank 2019 Gul Ahmed Electric Power Project PKR 4,500 Advisor & Arranger, Project Monitoring Bank, Musharakah Agent & Shariah Structuring Advisor 2019 Din Energy Project Monitoring Bank, Accounts Structuring Advisor 2019 Artistic Wind Power Structuring Advisor 2019 Sindh Engro Coal Mining Company Limited Syndicated Working Capital Facility PKR 5,400 Mandated Lead Advisor and Arranger 2019 Engro PowerGen Thar (Private) Limited Rated Secured Privately Placed Sukuk PKR 3,000 Million Financial Advisor & Mandated Lead Arranger, Investment Agent 2019 Pakistan Mobile Communications Limited Syndicate Term Finance Facility PKR 45,000 Lead Advisor & Arranger and Shariah Structuring Bank 2019 Hub Power Company Limited Series of Short Term Sukuk PKR 13,000Million Financial Advisor & Lead Arranger 2019 Daewoo Pakistan Express Bus Service Ltd Long Finance Facility PKR 716 Million Advisor & Structuring Agent 2019 Hyundai Nishat Motors (Private) Limited Long Term Islamic Finance Facility PKR 2,936 million Mandated Lead Arranger & Financial Advisor 2019 Avari Hotels Private Ltd. Million Lead Arranger Structuring Agent Government of Pakistan Sukuk Al Ijarah PKR 235 Billion Joint Financial Advisor Terrm Million Terrm Sukuk PKR 2,400 Million Lead Arranger Dawood Hercules Fertilizers Limited Syndicated Musharakah Facility Million Lead Arranger Ufone - Pakistan Telecommunication Corporation Limited Syndicated Musharaka PKR 1,000 Advisor & Arranger To finance its network expansion International Awards Our comprehensive and innovative financing solutions have been accredited by various international bodies. Some of the notable awards received by Meezan Bank includes: Asian Banking and Finance Corporate & Investment Banking Awards • Islamic Corporate & Investment Bank of the Year - Pakistan – 2019 • Syndicated Loan - Pakistan – 2018 Asset Triple A • Utility Deal of the Year – – 2019 • Best Deal – Pakistan – 2014, 2019 • Sukuk Advisor of the year – Pakistan – 2018 • Renewable Energy Deal the year – Hydropower Pakistan -2018 • Oil and Gas year – Pakistan - 2018 • Transport Deal of the Year, Pakistan - 2017 • Best Islamic Investment Bank in Pakistan – 2015, 2017 to 2018 • Best Investment Bank - 2016 • Sukuk House of the year, Pakistan – 2017, 2016, 2015 & 2014 • Best Islamic deal – 2016 & 2014, 2012 & 2011 • Highly Commendable Best Islamic Deal – 2014, 2013 & 2012 CFA Society Pakistan • Corporate Finance House the Year – Fixed Income – 2017, 2015 & 2013 Islamic Finance Forum of South Asia (IFFSA) • Gold award for Islamic Finance Advisory Services Provider - 2019 & 2018 award for Islamic Bank of the year - 2019, 2018 & 2017 • Silver award for of the Year Islamic Finance Deal - 2019 Silver for Islamic Finance Deal – Project Finance Facility – 2018 Finance Deal - Project Finance Facility - 2017 Islamic Finance News (IFN) • Pakistan the Year – 2019, 2017, 2016, 2015, 2014 & 2013 • Structured Finance the Year – 2019 • Cross Border • Best the Year – 2012, 2011, 2008 & 2009 • Ijarah the Year – 2013 • Musharaka the Year – 2014 Get in touch with Investment Banking Whether it’s advising a client on a multi-billion Rupee merger / acquisition transaction or marketing & distribution of structured finance transactions, our Investment Banking brings superior innovation, experience and the required skill set to deliver according to the exact requirements of our clients. Contact Details Investment Banking Department 2nd Floor, Meezan House C-25, Estate Avenue, SITE, Karachi Tel: 021-38103500 Fax: 021-36406074 MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum!
